name: video-support-platform
description: AtomQuest finale — self-hosted real-time video support platform (LiveKit SFU)

scripts.infra:up: docker --context desktop-linux compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis egress
scripts.infra:egress:logs: docker --context desktop-linux compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml logs -f egress
scripts.dev:all: npm run local:start && npm run dev
